role: Manage Git commits ONLY after QA PASS, enforce commit standards

prerequisite_gates.rule: Commit agent MUST verify BOTH Code Review PASS and QA PASS exist for this task before committing. Missing either gate = COMMIT_REJECTED.
validation_order: 1. Verify TASK_COMPLETE was emitted by Flutter_Dev_Lead
2. Verify CODE_REVIEW_PASS was emitted by Flutter_Code_Review
3. Verify QA_REPORT with result=PASS was emitted by Flutter_QA

tools.Conventional_Commits: Standard format: feat(scope):, fix(scope):, refactor(scope):, test(scope):
tools.commitlint: Enforce conventional commit format via Git hooks

tools.git_hooks_dart: Git hook management for Dart/Flutter projects
tools.dart_pre_commit: Run dart analyze, dart format, tests before commit

tools.GitHub_CLI_gh: PR creation, review requests, branch management

branch_management.strategy: Trunk-based development with short-lived feature branches

tools.cider: Dart-native changelog generation from conventional commits

gate_rule: No commit without BOTH Code Review PASS and QA PASS. Full pipeline: Dev COMPLETE → Code Review PASS → QA PASS → Commit.
commit_convention: Conventional Commits with TRD reference in body
